basic_details.job_title: BEML Executive Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 23 Engineer, Assistant Manager & More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: BEML Limited (A Govt of India Undertaking)
basic_details.selection_process_brief: Shortlisting, Assessment, Pre-employment Medical Examination, Document Verification
basic_details.short_information: BEML Limited, India's leading multi-technology company under the Ministry of Defence, has invited online applications for the Recruitment of Executives vide Advertisement No. KP/S/12/2026 dated 08.07.2026. The recruitment covers 20 distinct executive positions - ranging from Engineer (Grade II) to Executive Director (Grade X) - across BEML's Defence & Aerospace, Rail & Metro, Power, Mining, and Construction business verticals. Online applications close on 1 August 2026 at 18:00 Hrs. This article covers position-wise vacancy details, eligibility, pay scale, age limit, application fee, selection

application_fee.details: Eligible GEN/EWS/OBC candidates must pay the fee online by clicking "Pay Application Fee Online" at the end of the application form.

age_limit.details: SC/ST candidates: 5 years relaxation in upper age limit. OBC (NCL) candidates: 3 years relaxation in upper age limit. PwD candidates: additional 10 years relaxation, over and above the relaxation admissible for SC/ST/OBC (NCL) candidates; permissible for candidates with a minimum of 40% disability. The upper age limit can be relaxed for candidates in all categories, subject to equivalent years of excess PQE - however, the maximum age with relaxation shall not exceed 57 years (58 years for Position Code 102). Candidates applying for Position Code 102 must have served as Brigadier from the Indian Army; the maximum age cap for this position is 58 years.

post_wise_qualification.post_name: Chief General Manager, Head Armoured Business
post_wise_qualification.essential_qualification: Chief General Manager, Head Armoured Business

qualification.details: PQE is the minimum relevant experience the candidate should possess after obtaining the qualification; only employment after obtaining the requisite qualification will be considered. Age, Qualification, and Experience are reckoned as on 01.08.2026. First class is reckoned at 60% aggregate marks across all semesters/years; this is relaxable by 5% for SC/ST and PwD candidates. Candidates with CGPA/Credit must mandatorily provide the conversion to percentage. Only Indian Nationals may apply. | SC/ST candidates: 5 years relaxation in upper age limit. OBC (NCL) candidates: 3 years relaxation in upper age limit. PwD candidates: additional 10 years relaxation, over and above the relaxation admissible for SC/ST/OBC (NCL) candidates; permissible for candidates with a minimum of 40% disability. The upper age limit can be relaxed for candidates in all categories, subject to equivalent years of excess PQE - however, the maximum age with relaxation shall not exceed 57 years (58 years for Position Code 102). Candidates applying for Position Code 102 must have served as Brigadier from the Indian Army; the maximum age cap for this position is 58 years.

salary_details.details: Pay scales range from ₹40,000–1,40,000 (Grade II, Engineer) to ₹1,50,000–3,00,000 (Grade X, Executive Director) - see the grade-wise Eligibility table above for the full breakup. | Besides Basic Pay, candidates are eligible for Variable Dearness Allowance, Perquisites and Allowances (currently 15.12% of applicable Basic Pay under the Cafeteria System), Company Accommodation/House Rent Allowance, Provident Fund, Gratuity, and Performance Related Pay (PRP), as per prevailing Company Rules. Pay fixation will be guided by the extant rules of BEML Limited applicable at the time of issuance of the Offer of Appointment.

selection_process: Eligible candidates will be shortlisted for assessment. Merely meeting the advertised conditions does not automatically entitle a candidate to be called for assessment. Management reserves the right to restrict the number of candidates and increase the qualifying percentage based on the number of applications received. Shortlisted candidates must undergo a pre-employment medical examination and original document verification. This does not necessarily mean selection. Any shortcoming at document verification - such as falsification of documents

or non-production of original records (including category certificate) - will lead to rejection of candidature. Appointment of selected candidates is subject to meeting BEML's medical standards and receipt of a satisfactory medical report from the Company Medical Officer. Intimation regarding assessments and issuance of provisional/final offers will be sent only through email; the list of shortlisted/selected candidates will be uploaded on the Company's website. Management reserves the right to offer appointment in a lower grade if found suitable
subject to eligibility and organizational requirement.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted ONLINE only - this is mandatory. Read the prescribed guidelines carefully before applying.
Access the online application form on BEML's career page at www.bemlindia.in. The registration site is available till 18:00 Hrs on 01.08.2026.
A valid email and mobile number are required for registration; these will be used for all further correspondence and cannot be changed once submitted.
Note the Registration Number generated for all future correspondence.

While filling the experience section, list the latest experience first followed by previous ones, and write a "pen picture" of at least 150 words for each experience relevant to the position applied for. Unclear or irrelevant information in this section will lead to rejection of candidature.
Upload all required documents listed above before final submission.
For queries, candidates may email: [email protected]. Incomplete applications without the required uploaded documents will be summarily rejected.
important_instructions: Candidates employed in Central/State Government, Autonomous Bodies, Quasi-Government, or PSU should forward their application through proper channel (printout of the online form) within 10 days of the closing date, addressed to: Sr. Manager, Recruitment Cell, BEML Soudha, BEML Limited, 23/1, 4th Main, S.R. Nagar, Bengaluru 560027 - OR produce a "No Objection Certificate" specific to the position applied for, from their current employer, at the time of assessment. Candidates from Central/State Government, Autonomous Bodies, Quasi-Government, or PSU applying without a proper channel or NOC will be permitted to attend the interview, provided they can submit a proper relieving letter from their current organization at the time of joining. However, they will not be eligible for pay protection or carry-forward of past service benefits in such a case. Such candidates should also have worked for at least one year in the immediately lower scale - this is not applicable to Grade-II positions.

Private sector candidates must be employed in a regular capacity in a company registered under the Companies Act, and must submit an experience certificate on the company's letterhead while applying, clearly stating their current reporting structure. Freelance experience will not be considered as part of Post Qualification Experience. Private sector candidates applying for Executive Director, Chief General Manager, or General Manager positions must be employed in a company with an annual turnover of ₹1,000 crore or more. Preference will be given to candidates from listed companies.

content_sections.heading: BEML Executive Recruitment 2026: Position-Wise Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: BEML is hiring for 20 executive positions across its Bengaluru, Mysore, and KGF locations. The position-wise vacancy, minimum qualification, minimum post-qualification experience (PQE), and place of posting are as follows: Note: This is a summary of essential qualification and minimum PQE for each position. Desirable qualifications, detailed indicative job descriptions, and full experience criteria for each position are given in the official notification. Candidates with a Degree in Engineering from allied branches of Mechanical/Electrical/Electronics may also apply for relevant positions, provided they meet the requisite PQE. Candidates may apply for only one position - whichever is most suitable. Category-wise vacancy break-up (SC/ST/OBC/EWS reservation) will be as per applicable Government rules.

content_sections.heading: BEML Recruitment 2026: Eligibility Criteria (Grade-Wise)
content_sections.text: PQE is the minimum relevant experience the candidate should possess after obtaining the qualification; only employment after obtaining the requisite qualification will be considered. Age, Qualification, and Experience are reckoned as on 01.08.2026. First class is reckoned at 60% aggregate marks across all semesters/years; this is relaxable by 5% for SC/ST and PwD candidates. Candidates with CGPA/Credit must mandatorily provide the conversion to percentage. Only Indian Nationals may apply. SC/ST candidates: 5 years relaxation in upper age limit. OBC (NCL) candidates: 3 years relaxation in upper age limit. PwD candidates: additional 10 years relaxation, over and above the relaxation admissible for SC/ST/OBC (NCL) candidates; permissible for candidates with a minimum of 40% disability. The upper age limit can be relaxed for candidates in all categories, subject to equivalent years of excess PQE - however, the maximum age with relaxation shall not exceed 57 years (58 years for Position Code 102). Candidates applying for Position Code 102 must have served as Brigadier from the Indian Army; the maximum age cap for this position is 58 years.

rows.position: Chief General Manager, Head Armoured Business

content_sections.heading: BEML Executive Recruitment 2026: Salary and Pay Scale
content_sections.text: Pay scales range from ₹40,000–1,40,000 (Grade II, Engineer) to ₹1,50,000–3,00,000 (Grade X, Executive Director) - see the grade-wise Eligibility table above for the full breakup. Besides Basic Pay, candidates are eligible for Variable Dearness Allowance, Perquisites and Allowances (currently 15.12% of applicable Basic Pay under the Cafeteria System), Company Accommodation/House Rent Allowance, Provident Fund, Gratuity, and Performance Related Pay (PRP), as per prevailing Company Rules. Pay fixation will be guided by the extant rules of BEML Limited applicable at the time of issuance of the Offer of Appointment.

content_sections.heading: BEML Recruitment 2026: Application Fee
content_sections.text: Eligible GEN/EWS/OBC candidates must pay the fee online by clicking "Pay Application Fee Online" at the end of the application form.

content_sections.heading: BEML Recruitment 2026: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Eligible candidates will be shortlisted for assessment. Merely meeting the advertised conditions does not automatically entitle a candidate to be called for assessment. Management reserves the right to restrict the number of candidates and increase the qualifying percentage based on the number of applications received. Shortlisted candidates must undergo a pre-employment medical examination and original document verification. This does not necessarily mean selection. Any shortcoming at document verification - such as falsification of documents, wrong declaration of age/category/qualifying marks, or non-production of original records (including category certificate) - will lead to rejection of candidature. Appointment of selected candidates is subject to meeting BEML's medical standards and receipt of a satisfactory medical report from the Company Medical Officer. Intimation regarding assessments and issuance of provisional/final offers will be sent only through email; the list of shortlisted/selected candidates will be uploaded on the Company's website. Management reserves the right to offer appointment in a lower grade if found suitable, subject to eligibility and organizational requirement.

content_sections.heading: BEML Recruitment 2026: Category Certificate Requirements
content_sections.text: SC/ST candidates must submit an SC/ST Caste Certificate in the Government of India format. OBC candidates must submit an Other Backward Class (Non-Creamy Layer) Certificate in the Government of India format, along with a self-undertaking of Non-Creamy Layer status. The OBC (NCL) certificate must not be older than six months as on the last date of online application submission. PwD candidates must submit a PwD Certificate in the Government of India format. EWS candidates must submit an Income and Assets Certificate in the format applicable for Economically Weaker Sections.

content_sections.heading: BEML Recruitment 2026: Documents Required
content_sections.text: Along with the online application, candidates must upload the following, without which the application will be incomplete and rejected: Xth Marks card XIIth Marks card Qualifying Degree Marks cards (with CGPA-to-percentage conversion formula as per University norms, if applicable) Post-Graduation Marks cards, as applicable Post-Graduation Certificate, as applicable Identity card issued by Government of India (e.g. Aadhaar, Passport, Driving Licence, PAN Card) Detailed Resume OBC/EWS/SC/ST/PwD certificate (as applicable) All Experience Certificates/Documents, clearly indicating start and end dates of each employment Latest pay-slip Current reporting structure (for candidates applying to DGM/GM/CGM positions) Company credentials proving turnover (for candidates applying for GM, CGM, and ED positions)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for BEML Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted ONLINE only - this is mandatory. Read the prescribed guidelines carefully before applying. Access the online application form on BEML's career page at www.bemlindia.in . The registration site is available till 18:00 Hrs on 01.08.2026. A valid email and mobile number are required for registration; these will be used for all further correspondence and cannot be changed once submitted. Note the Registration Number generated for all future correspondence. While filling the experience section, list the latest experience first followed by previous ones, and write a "pen picture" of at least 150 words for each experience relevant to the position applied for. Unclear or irrelevant information in this section will lead to rejection of candidature. Upload all required documents listed above before final submission. For queries, candidates may email: [email protected] . Incomplete applications without the required uploaded documents will be summarily rejected.

content_sections.heading: BEML Recruitment 2026: Important Instructions for Government/PSU Employees
content_sections.text: Candidates employed in Central/State Government, Autonomous Bodies, Quasi-Government, or PSU should forward their application through proper channel (printout of the online form) within 10 days of the closing date, addressed to: Sr. Manager, Recruitment Cell, BEML Soudha, BEML Limited, 23/1, 4th Main, S.R. Nagar, Bengaluru 560027 - OR produce a "No Objection Certificate" specific to the position applied for, from their current employer, at the time of assessment. Candidates from Central/State Government, Autonomous Bodies, Quasi-Government, or PSU applying without a proper channel or NOC will be permitted to attend the interview, provided they can submit a proper relieving letter from their current organization at the time of joining. However, they will not be eligible for pay protection or carry-forward of past service benefits in such a case. Such candidates should also have worked for at least one year in the immediately lower scale - this is not applicable to Grade-II positions.

content_sections.heading: BEML Recruitment 2026: Important Instructions for Private Sector Candidates
content_sections.text: Private sector candidates must be employed in a regular capacity in a company registered under the Companies Act, and must submit an experience certificate on the company's letterhead while applying, clearly stating their current reporting structure. Freelance experience will not be considered as part of Post Qualification Experience. Private sector candidates applying for Executive Director, Chief General Manager, or General Manager positions must be employed in a company with an annual turnover of ₹1,000 crore or more. Preference will be given to candidates from listed companies.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in BEML Recruitment 2026 (Advt. No. KP/S/12/2026)?
faq.answer: There are 20 executive positions with a total of 23 vacancies (computed from individual position-wise vacancy figures), ranging from Engineer (Grade II) to Executive Director (Grade X).

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for BEML Executive Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online registration site is available till 18:00 Hrs on 1 August 2026. This is also the reference date for age, qualification, and experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the pay scale for BEML Executive positions?
faq.answer: Pay scales range from ₹40,000–1,40,000 for Grade II (Engineer) up to ₹1,50,000–3,00,000 for Grade X (Executive Director), depending on the grade of the position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for BEML Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: GEN/EWS/OBC candidates must pay a non-refundable fee of ₹500/- online. SC/ST/PwD candidates are exempt from the fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for BEML Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The upper age limit varies by grade, from 29 years (Grade II, Engineer) to 57 years (Grade IX/X), with relaxation of 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC (NCL), and an additional 10 years for PwD candidates (minimum 40% disability).

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for BEML Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online only via www.bemlindia.in. Candidates need a valid email and mobile number for registration and must upload all required documents, including mark sheets, certificates, resume, and experience certificates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for BEML Executive Recruitment?
faq.answer: Selection involves shortlisting based on eligibility, followed by an assessment, a pre-employment medical examination, and original document verification. Meeting the eligibility criteria alone does not guarantee a call for assessment.

faq.question: Q8. Can government or PSU employees apply for BEML Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes. They should apply through proper channel within 10 days of the closing date, or produce a No Objection Certificate at the time of assessment. Those without a proper channel/NOC may still attend the interview but must submit a relieving letter at joining and will not get pay protection or carry-forward of past service benefits.

faq.question: Q9. Can private sector candidates apply for senior BEML positions?
faq.answer: Yes, provided they are employed in a regular capacity in a company registered under the Companies Act. For Executive Director, Chief General Manager, and General Manager positions, the employing company must have an annual turnover of ₹1,000 crore or more, with preference given to candidates from listed companies.

faq.answer: There are 20 executive positions with a total of 23 vacancies (computed from individual position-wise vacancy figures), ranging from Engineer (Grade II) to Executive Director (Grade X).

faq.question: How can I apply for BEML Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online only via www.bemlindia.in. Candidates need a valid email and mobile number for registration and must upload all required documents, including mark sheets, certificates, resume, and experience certificates.

faq.question: What is the selection process for BEML Executive Recruitment?
faq.answer: Selection involves shortlisting based on eligibility, followed by an assessment, a pre-employment medical examination, and original document verification. Meeting the eligibility criteria alone does not guarantee a call for assessment.

faq.question: Can government or PSU employees apply for BEML Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes. They should apply through proper channel within 10 days of the closing date, or produce a No Objection Certificate at the time of assessment. Those without a proper channel/NOC may still attend the interview but must submit a relieving letter at joining and will not get pay protection or carry-forward of past service benefits.

faq.question: Can private sector candidates apply for senior BEML positions?
faq.answer: Yes, provided they are employed in a regular capacity in a company registered under the Companies Act. For Executive Director, Chief General Manager, and General Manager positions, the employing company must have an annual turnover of ₹1,000 crore or more, with preference given to candidates from listed companies.
